raw_source_reread_reason: Parent batch already preserved the one-file ultra3 orphan shell, the geometry layer, the stage16 and axis0_ab branch split, the mixed axis0_ab record contract, the ultra-strip seam, the ultra_big boundary, and the visibility seam.
reasons_for_candidate_status: Ultra3 is the correct bounded one-file ultra orphan and remains structurally distinct from nearby ultra families.
The geometry layer remains reusable only if exact sign symmetry is kept separate from non-exact magnitude.
The stage16 and axis0_ab branches remain reusable only if their different effect scales and contracts are preserved.
The ultra_big fence remains reusable only if catalog adjacency is kept weaker than family identity and evidence admission.
reasons_for_quarantine: Catalog visibility is not treated as evidence admission.
Berry flux is not treated as exact ±2pi.
Stage16 and axis0_ab are not flattened into one effect scale.
Ultra3 is not merged into ultra4 or the final ultra sweep.
Ultra_big remains outside this ultra3 reduction.
